modules.changes: Add query methods for FREEZE/UNFREEZE, table listing, mutation check, SYSTEM SYNC REPLICA, ATTACH PART, version query, log_sql_queries wrapper
Add upload (PutObject), download (GetObject), list (ListObjectsV2), delete (DeleteObject/DeleteObjects) methods to S3Client
New module: freeze.rs, mutations.rs, sync_replica.rs, checksum.rs, collect.rs
New module: stream.rs (file -> lz4 compress -> tar -> S3 PutObject)
New module: stream.rs (S3 GetObject -> lz4 decompress -> tar extract -> files)

top_level_files.changes: Add pub mod declarations for new modules
Wire command implementations to new modules
Add new error variants for backup/restore operations
New file: BackupManifest, TableManifest, PartInfo, DatabaseInfo structs
New file: local and remote backup listing
New file: glob-based table filter for -t flag
Add dependencies: async-compression, tar, nix, glob, CRC64 crate
